User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user of the application, including students, teachers, parents, and administrators.

id.description: Unique identifier for the User entity.

email.description: The user's email address, used for communication.

profileImageUrl.description: URL to the user's profile picture.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user account was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the user's profile was last updated.

Center.title: Center
Center.description: Represents a study center managed by administrators.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Center entity.

name.description: The name of the study center.

description.description: A brief description of the study center.

address.description: The physical address of the study center.

subscriptionTier.description: The current subscription tier of the center (e.g., Basic, Pro, Enterprise).

maxStudents.description: The maximum number of students allowed based on the subscription tier.

maxTeachers.description: The maximum number of teachers allowed based on the subscription tier.

aiUsageQuotaWeekly.description: The weekly quota for AI feature usage for the center.

dataRetentionPeriodDays.description: The number of days data will be retained for this center.

billingStatus.description: The current billing status of the center's subscription (e.g., 'active', 'trial', 'overdue').

subscriptionExpiresAt.description: Timestamp when the center's current subscription expires.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the center was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the center's details were last updated.

CenterMembership.title: CenterMembership
CenterMembership.description: Links a User to a Center with a specific role and status.

id.description: Unique identifier for the CenterMembership entity.

role.description: The role of the user within this specific center (e.g., 'admin', 'teacher', 'student', 'parent').

joinedAt.description: Timestamp when the user officially joined the center.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the membership details were last updated.

invitedByInviteCodeId.description: Reference to the InviteCode used for onboarding, if applicable. (Relationship: InviteCode 1:N CenterMembership)

InviteCode.title: InviteCode
InviteCode.description: Represents an invite code used for onboarding new members to a center.

id.description: Unique identifier for the InviteCode entity.

centerId.description: Reference to Center where this invite code is valid. (Relationship: Center 1:N InviteCode)

intendedRole.description: The role a user will be assigned upon redeeming this code (e.g., 'admin', 'teacher', 'student', 'parent').

expiresAt.description: Timestamp when the invite code will expire.

maxUses.description: The maximum number of times this invite code can be used.

usedCount.description: The number of times this invite code has been used.

createdByUserId.description: Reference to the User who generated this invite code. (Relationship: User 1:N InviteCode)

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the invite code was generated.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the invite code was last updated (e.g., used count incremented).

StudyPlanWeek.title: StudyPlanWeek
StudyPlanWeek.description: Represents a student's study plan for a specific week within a center.

id.description: Unique identifier for the StudyPlanWeek entity.

centerId.description: Reference to Center where this study plan is created. (Relationship: Center 1:N StudyPlanWeek)

uid.description: Reference to the Student user for whom this plan is created. (Relationship: User 1:N StudyPlanWeek)

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the study plan week was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the study plan week was last updated.

StudyPlanItem.title: StudyPlanItem
StudyPlanItem.description: Represents a single item or task within a student's weekly study plan.

id.description: Unique identifier for the StudyPlanItem entity.

studyPlanWeekId.description: Reference to the parent StudyPlanWeek. (Relationship: StudyPlanWeek 1:N StudyPlanItem)

title.description: The title or description of the study plan item.

weight.description: The importance or weight of the item for completion tracking (defaults to 1).

done.description: Indicates whether the study plan item has been completed.

doneAt.description: Timestamp when the study plan item was marked as done, if applicable.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the study plan item was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the study plan item was last updated.

StudyLogDay.title: StudyLogDay
StudyLogDay.description: Records a student's total study time for a specific day within a center.

id.description: Unique identifier for the StudyLogDay entity.

centerId.description: Reference to Center where this study log belongs. (Relationship: Center 1:N StudyLogDay)

uid.description: Reference to the Student user whose study time is logged. (Relationship: User 1:N StudyLogDay)

totalMinutes.description: The total number of minutes studied by the student on this day.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the study log was initially created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the study log was last updated.

StudyLogSubject.title: StudyLogSubject
StudyLogSubject.description: Details study time spent on a particular subject for a given StudyLogDay.

id.description: Unique identifier for the StudyLogSubject entity.

studyLogDayId.description: Reference to the parent StudyLogDay. (Relationship: StudyLogDay 1:N StudyLogSubject)

minutes.description: The number of minutes spent on this subject for the day.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when this subject log entry was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when this subject log entry was last updated.

AttendanceRecord.title: AttendanceRecord
AttendanceRecord.description: Records a student's attendance for a specific day at a center.

id.description: Unique identifier for the AttendanceRecord entity.

centerId.description: Reference to Center where this attendance record was made. (Relationship: Center 1:N AttendanceRecord)

studentId.description: Reference to the Student user whose attendance is recorded. (Relationship: User 1:N AttendanceRecord)

checkInAt.description: Timestamp when the student checked in, if applicable.

checkOutAt.description: Timestamp when the student checked out, if applicable.

confirmedByUserId.description: Reference to the User (teacher/admin) who confirmed or adjusted the attendance, if applicable. (Relationship: User 1:N AttendanceRecord)

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the attendance record was last updated.

LeaderboardEntry.title: LeaderboardEntry
LeaderboardEntry.description: Represents a student's entry on a leaderboard for a specific metric and period.

id.description: Unique identifier for the LeaderboardEntry entity.

centerId.description: Reference to Center where this leaderboard entry belongs. (Relationship: Center 1:N LeaderboardEntry)

periodKey.description: The period identifier (e.g., '2023-W40' for weekly, '2023-10' for monthly).

metricKey.description: The key of the metric being tracked (e.g., 'completionMaster', 'consistencyLeader', 'growthChampion').

studentId.description: Reference to the Student user for this leaderboard entry. (Relationship: User 1:N LeaderboardEntry)

value.description: The raw metric value for the student.

rank.description: The student's rank on the leaderboard for this metric and period.

displayNameSnapshot.description: A snapshot of the student's display name at the time of aggregation, for historical consistency.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when this leaderboard entry was last updated.

tieBreakerUpdatedAt.description: A timestamp used as a secondary tie-breaker for deterministic ranking order.

tieBreakerAttendanceCompletion.description: A numeric value (e.g., combined attendance/completion rate) used as a tertiary tie-breaker for ranking.

DailyStudentStat.title: DailyStudentStat
DailyStudentStat.description: Aggregated daily performance statistics for a student within a center, used for dashboards.

id.description: Unique identifier for the DailyStudentStat entity.

centerId.description: Reference to Center where these stats are generated. (Relationship: Center 1:N DailyStudentStat)

studentId.description: Reference to the Student user for whom these stats are generated. (Relationship: User 1:N DailyStudentStat)

todayPlanCompletionRate.description: The completion rate of today's study plan items (0.0 to 1.0).

totalStudyMinutes.description: The total minutes studied by the student on this day.

attendanceStreakDays.description: The current consecutive attendance streak in days.

weeklyPlanCompletionRate.description: The average plan completion rate over the current week (0.0 to 1.0).

studyTimeGrowthRate.description: The growth rate of study time compared to a previous period, clamped between -0.8 and 3.0.

riskDetected.description: Indicates if the AI system has detected a risk for this student on this day.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when this daily stat record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when this daily stat record was last updated.

AIOutput.title: AIOutput
AIOutput.description: Stores AI-generated content like risk flags, parent summaries, or intervention strategies.

id.description: Unique identifier for the AIOutput entity.

centerId.description: Reference to Center where this AI output was generated. (Relationship: Center 1:N AIOutput)

studentId.description: Reference to the Student user related to this AI output. (Relationship: User 1:N AIOutput)

basedOnMetricsSnapshot.description: A JSON string snapshot of the metrics and data used to generate this AI output.

modelUsed.description: The identifier of the AI model used to generate this output (e.g., 'gpt-4').

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the AI output was generated.

safetyFields.description: A JSON string containing results from content moderation or safety checks.

auditLogId.description: Reference to the AuditLog entry for this AI output, for traceability. (Relationship: AuditLog 1:N AIOutput)

AuditLog.title: AuditLog
AuditLog.description: Records important actions and system events for traceability and security.

id.description: Unique identifier for the AuditLog entity.

centerId.description: Reference to the Center where the action occurred, if applicable. (Relationship: Center 1:N AuditLog)

action.description: A description of the action performed (e.g., 'inviteCodeRedeemed', 'attendanceConfirmed', 'aiOutputGenerated').

actorId.description: Reference to the User who performed the action, or a system identifier if automated. (Relationship: User 1:N AuditLog)

targetId.description: The ID of the entity that was affected by the action.

targetType.description: The type of the entity that was affected (e.g., 'InviteCode', 'AttendanceRecord', 'AIOutput', 'CenterMembership').

details.description: A JSON string containing additional context or details about the action.

timestamp.description: Timestamp when the action was logged.

CenterStat.title: CenterStat
CenterStat.description: Aggregated monthly key performance indicators (KPIs) for a study center.

id.description: Unique identifier for the CenterStat entity.

centerId.description: Reference to Center for which these statistics are generated. (Relationship: Center 1:N CenterStat)

averageAttendanceRate.description: The average attendance rate for students in the center during the month (0.0 to 1.0).

averagePlanCompletionRate.description: The average study plan completion rate for students in the center during the month (0.0 to 1.0).

averageStudyTimeGrowthRate.description: The average study time growth rate for students in the center during the month.

seatUtilizationRate.description: The percentage of occupied seats in the center during the month (0.0 to 1.0).

riskStudentCount.description: The number of students identified as 'at-risk' during the month.

reEnrollmentProjections.description: Projected number of student re-enrollments for the upcoming period.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when this center stat record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when this center stat record was last updated.

Seat.title: Seat
Seat.description: Represents a physical or virtual seat within a study center.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Seat entity.

centerId.description: Reference to Center where this seat is located. (Relationship: Center 1:N Seat)

label.description: A human-readable label for the seat (e.g., 'A1', 'Window Seat 3').

status.description: The current status of the seat (e.g., 'available', 'occupied', 'maintenance').

assignedStudentId.description: Reference to the Student user currently assigned to this seat, if occupied. (Relationship: User 1:1 Seat)

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the seat record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the seat record was last updated.

SeatAssignment.title: SeatAssignment
SeatAssignment.description: Records the assignment of a student to a specific seat for a given month.

id.description: Unique identifier for the SeatAssignment entity.

centerId.description: Reference to Center where this seat assignment occurred. (Relationship: Center 1:N SeatAssignment)

monthKey.description: The month identifier in 'YYYY-MM' format (e.g., '2023-10') for which the assignment is active.

studentId.description: Reference to the Student user assigned to the seat. (Relationship: User 1:N SeatAssignment)

seatId.description: Reference to the Seat that was assigned. (Relationship: Seat 1:N SeatAssignment)

planType.description: The type of plan associated with this seat assignment (e.g., 'daily', 'weekly').

active.description: Indicates if the seat assignment is currently active for the given month.

assignedAt.description: Timestamp when the seat was assigned.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the seat assignment record was last updated.

Enrollment.title: Enrollment
Enrollment.description: Records a student's enrollment period and status within a center.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Enrollment entity.

centerId.description: Reference to Center where the student is enrolled. (Relationship: Center 1:N Enrollment)

studentId.description: Reference to the Student user who is enrolled. (Relationship: User 1:N Enrollment)

startAt.description: Timestamp when the enrollment period began.

endAt.description: Timestamp when the enrollment period is scheduled to end.

status.description: The current status of the enrollment (e.g., 'active', 'completed', 'cancelled', 'deferred').

renewalIntent.description: Indicates the student's or parent's intent for re-enrollment (e.g., 'yes', 'no', 'undecided', 'N/A').

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the enrollment record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the enrollment record was last updated.

NotificationPreference.title: NotificationPreference
NotificationPreference.description: Stores user-specific notification settings for a particular center.

id.description: Unique identifier for the NotificationPreference entity.

userId.description: Reference to the User whose preferences are stored. (Relationship: User 1:N NotificationPreference)

centerId.description: Reference to Center for which these preferences apply. (Relationship: Center 1:N NotificationPreference)

enabled.description: Indicates if notifications are generally enabled for this user and center.

channels.description: An array of preferred notification channels (e.g., 'FCM', 'email', 'in-app').

quietHoursStart.description: The start time for quiet hours, in HH:MM format (e.g., '22:00').

quietHoursEnd.description: The end time for quiet hours, in HH:MM format (e.g., '08:00').

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the notification preferences were created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the notification preferences were last updated.

definition.description: Stores individual user profiles. Access is typically restricted to the user themselves for modification, and limited read access for others (e.g., display names in leaderboards, which are denormalized).

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user.

definition.description: Top-level collection for study centers. Contains center configuration and subscription details. Access is typically restricted to center members, with administrators having write access.

params.name: centerId
params.description: The unique identifier of the study center.

definition.description: Links users to centers, defining their roles (admin, teacher, student, parent) within that center. Crucial for authorization rules, which will read `request.auth.uid`'s role from this path.

params.name: centerId
params.description: The unique identifier of the study center.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user who is a member of the center.

definition.description: Stores invite codes for new member onboarding. Each code has a denormalized 'centerId' for querying and rule validation.

params.name: inviteCodeId
params.description: The unique identifier of the invite code.

definition.description: Stores a student's weekly study plan within a specific center. The 'centerId' and 'uid' are part of the path, ensuring clear ownership and efficient querying.

params.description: The unique identifier of the study center.

params.name: uid
params.description: The unique identifier of the student user.

params.name: weekKey
params.description: The week identifier in 'YYYY-WW' format (e.g., '2023-W40').

params.name: uid
params.description: The unique identifier of the student user.

params.name: weekKey
params.description: The week identifier in 'YYYY-WW' format (e.g., '2023-W40').

params.name: itemId
params.description: The unique identifier of the study plan item.

definition.description: Aggregates a student's total study time for a specific day within a center. 'centerId' and 'uid' are part of the path for clear context.

params.name: centerId
params.description: The unique identifier of the study center.

params.name: uid
params.description: The unique identifier of the student user.

params.name: dateKey
params.description: The date identifier in 'YYYY-MM-DD' format (e.g., '2023-10-26').

definition.description: Details study time spent on specific subjects for a given day. The hierarchical path provides full context.

params.name: centerId
params.description: The unique identifier of the study center.

params.name: uid
params.description: The unique identifier of the student user.

params.name: dateKey
params.description: The date identifier in 'YYYY-MM-DD' format (e.g., '2023-10-26').

params.name: studyLogSubjectId
params.description: The unique identifier of the study log subject entry.

definition.description: Records attendance for a specific student on a given date within a center. Grouping by date under 'attendanceRecords' facilitates teacher review. Includes denormalized 'centerId', 'studentId', and 'dateKey' for authorization independence and simplified security rules.

params.name: centerId
params.description: The unique identifier of the study center.

params.name: dateKey
params.description: The date identifier in 'YYYY-MM-DD' format (e.g., '2023-10-26').

params.name: studentId
params.description: The unique identifier of the student user.

definition.description: Stores aggregated leaderboard data, segmented by center, period, and metric. Designed for read-only client access and efficient queries. Includes denormalized 'centerId', 'periodKey', 'metricKey', and 'studentId' for authorization independence and simplified security rules.

params.name: centerId
params.description: The unique identifier of the study center.

params.name: periodKey
params.description: The period identifier (e.g., '2023-W40' for weekly, '2023-10' for monthly).

params.name: metricKey
params.description: The key of the metric being tracked (e.g., 'completionMaster').

params.name: studentId
params.description: The unique identifier of the student user.

definition.description: Aggregated daily performance statistics for students, segmented by center and date. Used for dashboards. Includes denormalized 'centerId', 'dateKey', and 'studentId' for authorization independence and simplified security rules.

params.description: The unique identifier of the study center.

params.name: dateKey
params.description: The date identifier in 'YYYY-MM-DD' format (e.g., '2023-10-26').

params.name: studentId
params.description: The unique identifier of the student user.

definition.description: Stores AI-generated content (risk flags, summaries, interventions) for students within a center. Client write forbidden, written only by Cloud Functions. Includes denormalized 'centerId' and 'studentId' for authorization independence and simplified security rules.

definition.description: Records important actions and system events within a center for traceability. Client write forbidden, written only by Cloud Functions or Admin SDK. Includes denormalized 'centerId' for authorization independence and simplified security rules.

definition.description: Aggregated monthly KPIs for a study center. Designed for read-only client access and efficient queries for administrators. Includes denormalized 'centerId' for authorization independence and simplified security rules.

firestore.reasoning:
The Firestore structure for LEARNING-LAB prioritizes robust security, scalability, and debuggability by strictly adhering to the mandated design principles.

**Authorization Independence (CRITICAL):**
This design achieves authorization independence primarily by: 
1.  **Path-Based Context:** For most center-specific data, the `centerId` and `studentId` (or `userId`) are embedded directly into the collection paths (e.g., `/centers/{centerId}/plans/{uid}/weeks/{weekKey}`). This makes the immediate authorization context available directly from the request path parameters.
2.  **Denormalized Authorization Context in Documents:** Critical identifiers like `centerId`, `uid`, and relevant date/period keys (`dateKey`, `weekKey`) are explicitly included as fields within documents, even when they are part of the path. This ensures that security rules can evaluate access without relying on `get()` calls to parent documents to retrieve these core identifiers. For example, a `StudyPlanWeek` document explicitly contains `centerId` and `uid` in its data, allowing rules to verify the `centerId` matches the path and the `uid` matches the authenticated user (or a student accessible by an authorized teacher).
3.  **Controlled Use of `get()` for User's Own Role:** The core of center-specific authorization relies on a user's role, stored in `/centers/{centerId}/members/{userId}`. Security rules will use a `get(/centers/$(centerId)/members/$(request.auth.uid))` call to retrieve the *current user's own role* for the specific center. This is a deliberate and accepted deviation from avoiding *all* `get()` calls, as it's retrieving the authenticated user's *personal authorization context* rather than arbitrary data from a parent document or another entity. This ensures DBAC (Database-Backed Access Control) without introducing complex hierarchical dependencies on other data documents.

**QAPs (Rules are not Filters):**
The structure ensures that security rules are not used as filters, but rather to enforce access control on explicitly defined paths, enabling secure and efficient `list` operations:
1.  **Structural Segregation (Homogeneous Security Posture):** Collections are designed so that all documents within them share the same security requirements. For example, all `LeaderboardEntry` documents under `/centers/{centerId}/leaderboards/{periodKey}/{metricKey}/entries` are designed to be read-only for clients, simplifying `list` rules. Similarly, student-specific data (e.g., `StudyPlanWeek`) is deeply nested under `/centers/{centerId}/plans/{uid}/...`, allowing rules to easily restrict a student to only `list` their own data (where `uid == request.auth.uid`).
2.  **Explicit Path-Based Access Control:** For `list` operations, the collection paths themselves often serve as implicit filters. For instance, a student can perform a `list` on `/centers/{centerId}/plans/$(request.auth.uid)/weeks`, and the rules can strictly enforce that `uid` in the path must match `request.auth.uid`. For teachers or administrators, `list` access to subcollections like `/centers/{centerId}/plans/{uid}/weeks` will be granted based on their `centerId` role, allowing them to query across all students they are authorized to manage, while still respecting the QAP principle (i.e., they are given access to the *entire subcollection* for authorized `uid`s, not filtering a broader collection).
3.  **Read-Only Aggregates:** Key performance indicators and AI outputs (`LeaderboardEntry`, `DailyStudentStat`, `CenterStat`, `AIOutput`) are explicitly designed as aggregated, read-only collections for clients. This simplifies `list` rules to basic role checks, as there's no client-side modification possible, reducing complexity and attack surface.
